name: harness
description: Multi-agent sprint orchestration harness for long-running application development.

interface.longDescription: Runs an Anthropic-style application harness with 6 agents: initializer, planner, generator, evaluator, coordinator, and releaser. Domain-agnostic with support for software, architecture, tender, research, content, and business analysis profiles.
defaultPrompt: Build an app using the harness.
Review whether this harness really followed the sprint plan.
Run continuous multi-agent app delivery until done.
